requirement_text: Federations shall support coordinated save of federation state
Save coordination shall collect completion or failure from participating federates before declaring the save outcome
Scheduled save requests shall take effect at the requested logical time when time conditions are satisfied
Federations shall support aborting an in progress save
Federations shall support coordinated restore from a named saved state
Restore coordination shall collect completion or failure from participating federates before declaring the restore outcome
Successful restore shall reinstate saved logical time state for participating federates
Federations shall support aborting an in progress restore
Successful restore shall reinstate saved object instance existence names and attribute values
Successful restore shall reinstate saved object ownership and attribute ownership state
Successful restore shall reinstate saved federate runtime flags including asynchronous delivery time-regulation time-constrained and lookahead state
Successful restore shall preserve federate automatic resign directives and advisory-switch settings when they are part of the saved local state
Successful restore shall preserve federate reporting and conveyance switches when they are part of the saved local state
Successful restore shall discard stale pre-restore callback-queue state and reestablish post-restore callback flow from the restored coordination sequence
Successful restore shall discard stale message-retraction bookkeeping and queued transient retraction state inconsistent with the restored federation state
Successful restore shall reinstate saved attribute order override state when those overrides are part of the saved federate-local delivery state
Successful restore shall reinstate saved interaction order override state when those overrides are part of the saved federate-local delivery state
Callback enable or disable state shall remain a post-restore local runtime policy choice and shall not be reinstated from saved federation state
Successful restore shall reinstate saved attribute transportation override state when those overrides are part of the saved federate-local delivery state
Successful restore shall reinstate saved interaction transportation override state when those overrides are part of the saved federate-local delivery state
Restore requests for unknown save labels shall fail without entering restore in progress state
